tweets: The 10 Heavenly Stems (천간, cheongan) are the alphabet of Korean Saju. Find your Day Master and 80% of your chart is already decoded. 🧵

1/ There are 10 stems = 5 elements × 2 polarities (Yang/Yin):

甲 Gap (Yang Wood) · 乙 Eul (Yin Wood)
丙 Byeong (Yang Fire) · 丁 Jeong (Yin Fire)
戊 Mu (Yang Earth) · 己 Gi (Yin Earth)
庚 Gyeong (Yang Metal) · 辛 Sin (Yin Metal)
壬 Im (Yang Water) · 癸 Gye (Yin Water)

2/ The 5 Yang stems are public, expressive, large-scale:

甲 = tall pine, leader
丙 = sun, charismatic
戊 = mountain, steadfast
庚 = sword, decisive
壬 = ocean, strategic

3/ The 5 Yin stems are inward, refined, fine-scale:

乙 = vine, adaptive
丁 = candle, intimate
己 = garden, nurturing
辛 = jewel, polished
癸 = mist, intuitive
4/ Same element, different mode. A 丙 (Yang Fire) is the sun warming a city. A 丁 (Yin Fire) is the candle warming one face. Both are 'Fire types' — but radically different lives.

5/ Important: no Day Master is 'better.' What matters is the BALANCE between your Day Master and the rest of your chart. A weak Day Master in a supportive chart > a strong Day Master in a draining one.

Find your Day Master free (English):
https://cheonmyeongdang.vercel.app/en/ten-heavenly-stems.html

Which stem do you think you are? 🪶
bluesky_short:
10 Heavenly Stems = the alphabet of Korean Saju. Yang Wood, Yin Wood, Yang Fire... your Day Master is one of these ten.

Find yours free (English): https://cheonmyeongdang.vercel.app/en/ten-heavenly-stems.html
